_comment: Starter guidance graph seeded by guidanceaddon_starter\local\graph_seeder. Each graph is keyed by a stable idnumber; seeding is a no-op if that idnumber already exists. Leaf 'target.type' is a tool_guidance target key ('activity' or 'preset'); the remaining keys are that target's config. Preset short names must match records shipped by guidanceaddon_preset (addon/preset/assets/presets.xml); when the preset addon is absent, preset leaves fall back to a display-only card.

graphs.name: Activity chooser
graphs.description: Helps a teacher decide which activity to add to a course.

nodes.title: What would you like to do?
What would you like to present?
How should the detailed content be structured?
Text and media area
nodes.description: Content displayed directly on the course page.

nodes.title: Page
nodes.description: A single web page inside the course.

nodes.title: Book
nodes.description: Multi-page content organised into chapters and sections.

nodes.title: What would you like students to share?
Personal introductions
nodes.description: Each student posts one introduction about themselves.

nodes.title: General discussion forum
nodes.description: A standard forum for sharing informal experiences, ideas or resources.

nodes.title: What type of production will students submit?
Assignment
nodes.description: Students submit a file, text, audio or video for grading.

nodes.title: How should the contribution be organised?
Q&A forum
nodes.description: Students post their own answer before they can see others' responses.

nodes.title: Standard discussion forum
nodes.description: Students can start discussions and reply freely.

nodes.title: Single discussion per student
nodes.description: Each student starts one discussion and can reply to others.

nodes.title: Database
nodes.description: A structured entry using predefined fields.
